How to connect
Stratum URL
stratum+tcp://pool.oggchain.com:8008
Username (your wallet address)
—
Example (oggminer)
oggminer.exe -P stratum1+tcp://0xWALLET.worker@pool.oggchain.com:8008
Pool fee 1% · payout threshold 0.5 OGG. Point any ProgPoW miner at the stratum URL above using your OGG address as the username (add .worker to name your rig).
